patch.value:
GitHub: https://github.com/unbraind/pm-cli/issues/446

## Problem
`pm get` omits the schedule facet (events/start_at/end_at/location) for Meeting/Event/Reminder items — the single-item read primitive cannot show the defining fields of calendar types; agents must fall back to calendar/agenda commands.

## Proposed fix
Include the schedule facet in pm get output (standard depth and above; respect --fields), matching where list/agenda expose it.

## Definition of done
pm get shows events/start_at/end_at/location for scheduled types in TOON and JSON; spec added; docs COMMANDS.md get section updated.
GH-446: pm get omits schedule facet (events/start_at/end_at/location) for Meeting/Event/Reminder

Dogfood GH-446: the single-item read primitive hides the defining fields of calendar types. Duplicate check: searched get schedule meeting event — pm-uzmf (closed calendar ergonomics) did not cover get projection; no open overlap.
pm get renders the schedule facet for scheduled types in TOON and JSON at standard depth; --fields can project it; spec + COMMANDS.md updated
